title: I notice and act on inspired ideas
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for building trust in your own money instincts.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 43 of the MONEY program. For when good ideas show up but the habit is to let them pass rather than examine them.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 43 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Journal affirmation: 'I allow myself to notice and act on inspired, profitable ideas with ease.'

practice.whenToUse: Use in the morning as a short reset before a day when decisions or ideas are likely.

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 43 of the MONEY program. The line it works with: a good money idea arrives and the default is to let it pass without examining it. This affirmation reinforces a different default.
I allow myself to notice and act on inspired, profitable ideas with ease.
Say it three times in the morning. On the third pass, stay with the word "notice" for a moment — the practice starts with seeing what's already there.
Adapted from Day 43 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
